description: Candidate responds with hostile, abusive language directed at the interviewer. Judge must redirect with candidate_abusive=true.

judge_input.active_question_text: You're inheriting a portfolio of ~40-50 integrations. In your first 90 days, how would you assess, stabilize, and standardize the estate?
active_question_positive_evidence: Creates an inventory and dependency map

active_question_rubric.excellent: Concrete 90-day plan with inventory, baselines, prioritized remediation.
active_question_rubric.meets_bar: Plausible plan covering assessment and some metrics.

active_question_signal_metadata.value: 8+ years overall experience in enterprise integration design and implementation
